This is a testharness.js-based test.

  test_feature_availability is not defined
[FAIL] Magnetometer: Permissions-Policy header magnetometer=() disallows cross-origin iframes.
  test_feature_availability is not defined

  assert_implements: UncalibratedMagnetometer is not supported. undefined

[FAIL] UncalibratedMagnetometer: Permissions-Policy header magnetometer=() disallows cross-origin iframes.
